description: Input schema template for someone-min-age check. Verifies at least one person from a list meets a minimum age requirement.

{peopleIds}.description: A person who may be checked for the minimum age requirement. Each entry in the peopleIds array creates a key here.

dateOfBirth.description: The person's date of birth in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

peopleIds.description: List of person IDs to check (at least one must meet the age requirement). Each ID corresponds to a key under situation.people.

asOfDate.description: The date to calculate age as of (defaults to today if not provided)
